name: langfuse
description: Skills for working with Langfuse, the open-source LLM engineering platform for tracing, prompt management, and evaluation.

interface.shortDescription: Work with Langfuse tracing, prompts, datasets, scores, and docs.
interface.longDescription: Reusable workflows for instrumenting applications, querying Langfuse traces, managing prompts, running evaluations, and using Langfuse documentation from ChatGPT or Codex.
defaultPrompt: Set up Langfuse tracing in this app.
Inspect Langfuse traces for recent failures.
Prepare this application and its Langfuse project for the v4 platform migration.
